market.summary: Asian markets rallied on March 25 due to easing oil prices and hopes for Middle East de-escalation; KOSPI outlook raised by Goldman Sachs.

art.summary: Chanel Korea reports record-breaking sales, highlighting strong luxury demand in the region despite economic concerns.
art.featured_event: Luxury retail sector resilience in S. Korea.

corporate.alert: SK Hynix planning U.S. stock listing in late 2026; preliminary review of Lotte Chemical and YNCC merger underway.
